name: alalyzer
description: Albion Online analysis tooling with an Electron shell, WebSocket backend, React frontend, structured logging, and committed graphify outputs.

scripts.check: node --check main.js && node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/sniffer.js && node --check backend/simulator.js && npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix frontend run lint

author: Aditya Bichave
